extraction.one_line_summary: LOPEZ Miguel Angel attacked 13km from finish on Monachil climb, dropped Contador from breakaway trio, took his third stage win.
tactical_patterns: Lopez systematically attacks breakaways rather than peloton at 2000m+ altitude, conserving energy by avoiding pace-making duties early.
Zakarin outsprinted Nibali 6km from finish when both marked each other in GC group, showing third-place podium aggression.
Astana and Bahrain-Merida controlled peloton to keep 17-man break under 3min, suggesting they wanted selective finale not wholesale breakaway success.

rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Third stage win in four days at high altitude confirms exceptional adaptation above 2000m compared to GC rivals.
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Dropped by Lopez with 6km remaining and barely held GC group suggests Madrid podium no longer realistic.
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: Aggressive enough to outsprint Nibali for second shows he's racing for final podium position not defending.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: Gained ground initially on final climb but faded, revealing limits at extreme altitude versus stage-race fatigue.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Gained 6 seconds on Nibali without attacking on brutal summit finish, signaling superior high-altitude recovery.
